Ask Thomas about the indigens
in Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.name: Ask Thomas about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask Thomas about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Thomas about Doll-based combat.

rows.label: tev017601_SEL0141
rows.name: Ask Thomas about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Thomas about recent developments.

rows.label: tev017601_SEL5021
rows.name: Ask Thomas about recent developments.

rows.label: tev017601_SEL6021
rows.name: Ask Thomas about recent developments.

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0015
rows.name:
Why not get used to battling indigens
by fighting some ovis? This place
is lousy with 'em, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Unlike lupuses and other, more ferocious indigens,
ovis won't even attack unless you hit them first.
That makes them useful as training dummies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0017
rows.name:
Another piece of advice: don't mistakenly
pick a fight with any of the dangerous
creatures near Sayram Lake to the north.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Numerous skilled Interceptor have
fallen to the indigens in that area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0019
rows.name:
As noble a goal as protecting the city is, it's not worth
risking your life like that. If you ever catch the eye
of one of those indigens, just turn and run away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Apparently, Nelson's
team has gone missing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0026
rows.name:
They had planned to install a number of data
probes and then come straight back to the
city. What could have happened to them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0027
rows.name:
I don't know what sort of foe they ran
into, but let this be a lesson; you have
to be careful when you're exploring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0032
rows.name:
I heard they found the fort of the Bias
xenoforms that murdered Nelson's team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0033
rows.name:
The entire Interceptor Union has been
put on high alert so we'll be ready
to repel them when they attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0034
rows.name:
Anyway, you can leave that sort of
thing to us. You go ahead and focus
on your exploration mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0035
rows.name:
I vow on my pride as an
Interceptor that not a single
Bias will set foot in this city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0040
rows.name:
There's the rampaging duoguill at the
pond near Roof Rock, the xiphias that
was discovered at Northpointe Cove...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0041
rows.name:
Luciel, the Eternal, the millesaur
at West Janpath Plain...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0042
rows.name:
There do seem to be quite a few
Overeds that appear in this area![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0043
rows.name:
They've already claimed the
lives of many Avalanche.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0044
rows.name:
So don't even try to engage
them unless you're extremely
confident in your skills![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0050
rows.name:
A ship belonging to a new type of xenoform
has been discovered on the continent of
Valley of Oblivion to the northeast of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0051
rows.name:
The indigens here are nothing
compared to the ferocious beasts
that inhabit that region.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0052
rows.name:
And we can't dismiss the possibility
that those xenos will be as hostile
as the Bias we've already met.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0053
rows.name:
If you're heading out to see for
yourself, make sure you're well
equipped for a dangerous journey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0058
rows.name:
When the Ma-non ship flew in
from the east, I was sure we
were under enemy attack![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0059
rows.name:
It was certainly a relief to hear that
they'd come to sign a friendship treaty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0060
rows.name:
If we can ally with an alien race that has access
to that level of technology, it could make this
war a whole lot easier from here on out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0061
rows.name:
Things haven't been easy for us,
but I feel like this at least
provides a glimmer of hope.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0065
rows.name:
I can't believe we slugged it out with
the Growth. Talk about a fierce battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0066
rows.name:
While you were bravely defending the city,
we were running around its perimeter,
trying to head off the incoming enemies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0067
rows.name:
But no matter how many we killed,
more and more reinforcements kept
pouring in from the north.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0068
rows.name:
If you travel far northeast of here, you'll eventually
reach the continent of White Woods. I wonder if the
enemy's headquarters are in that region?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0069
rows.name:
If we could get a foothold in that
region, it would be useful in
preparing for their next attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0075
rows.name:
*yawn* Man, I'm bored... Boooooored bored
bored... BoooOOooOooooOOOooOOooored...
Plus, this weather is making me sleepy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0076
rows.name:
Hmm? I see the way you're looking at me.
Do you think I'm some sort of layabout?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0077
rows.name:
Let me tell you something, pal!
I don't just stand here all day
like a stick in the mud![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0078
rows.name:
Sometimes I'm out there battling fierce
indigens to keep this east gate safe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0079
rows.name:
So what if I space out at my post
now and then? You don't have any
sort of problem with that, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0080
rows.name:
When I see someone using a Doll to
shoot down little indigens like the
ovis, I can't help but shake my head.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0081
rows.name:
After all, you barely get any
experience for defeating foes
smaller than your Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0082
rows.name:
There's lots of experience you
can't earn with Dolls that you
can earn in ground combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG0083
rows.name:
You should assess each of your foes
and decide whether they should be
fought with a Doll or on foot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG1001
rows.name:
I tried that ball of honeysmoke
you recommended to me, and wow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG1002
rows.name:
Instead of us having to chase down
indigens, they all came running to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG1003
rows.name:
And then, since we couldn't see anything through the
smoke, my team was decimated and everyone ended up in
the maintenance center! ...I told them to bill you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG2001
rows.name:
That high-temperature-pot invention
you recommended really is incredible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG2002
rows.name:
I heard its temperature never
cools so I thought, "You know,
this just might work."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG2003
rows.name:
Then I brought it to a xenoform
craftsman, had it installed in my Doll,
and BOOM! Thing worked like a charm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG2004
rows.name:
Now it's good-bye fuel problems, hello
self-powered thermoelectric Doll![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG2005
rows.name:
Of course, there's now a big saucepan
sticking out of its back, which doesn't
look cool at all. ...But still![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG2006
rows.name:
What's important is that my success
rate is way up, and I'm doing twice
as many jobs as I did before. Thanks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG3001
rows.name:
That electric hammock you
recommended was incredible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG3002
rows.name:
I've had lower back problems for a while
now, but when I woke up after a night in
that hammock, the pain was completely gone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG3003
rows.name:
I'm never gonna give
that thing up. Thanks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG4001
rows.name:
You wouldn't believe how many
monsters surrounded us when we
tossed out that ball of honeysmoke.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG4002
rows.name:
What a disaster. It's
a miracle I survived![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG4003
rows.name:
You know what? I'm gonna have Lu split the bill
for my team's repairs. You tell him to take
responsibility for this! He can't run away from me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG5001
rows.name:
I never imagined a single
saucepan could generate enough
heat to power an entire Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG5002
rows.name:
Lu's a true genius. He really has some
fantastic products including that
high-temperature-pot invention of his.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG5003
rows.name:
Tell him I'm gonna keep this city
safe with my super saucepan Doll![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG6001
rows.name:
Thanks to that electric hammock you
recommended, my back has never felt better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG6002
rows.name:
L really is a genius. I can't believe
he's managed to make ergonomic goods
that are even effective on Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev017601_MSG6003
rows.name:
That store of his is gonna be the
first place I shop from now on.[ST:wait ]
